creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote on 15.08.2011 15:50:
> Maintainer of security/hydra,
>
> Please note that PR ports/159789 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/159789
>

Please commit this patch. It unconditionally adds dns/libidn dependency 
since hydra will unconditionally link with it if installed. This should 
solve original reporter's build breakage.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan
